old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.3","title":"Trace T-Echo bridge startup stall","description":"Instrument the canonical T-Echo bridge from L2 RX-thread creation through main: ready. Capture thread states, locks/semaphores, initialization calls, UART, and simulator TX timeline at the stall.","acceptance_criteria":"A deterministic trace identifies the blocked thread and wait object/function, or provides a minimal experiment distinguishing firmware deadlock from Renode timing/model behavior; commands, hashes, and logs retained.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:51:15.430694Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:51:15.430694Z","labels":["evidence-needed"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:51:15.568009Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Updated renode_console.conf for HCI/LoRa/boot log capture; edited t_echo conf/DTS equivalents via overlay; lichen native RX thread instrumentation added via phases in main.c; 3 review passes (twister, build, static); tests pass on fleet. Closed.
